questions.question: Design a 4-bit full adder using combinatorial logic. What are the inputs and outputs of the circuit?
questions.hint: Use K-maps or truth tables to derive the logic functions

questions.question: A binary number 1110 needs to be decoded to its equivalent 4-bit binary representation. What logic gates are required to implement a 4-to-1 decoder?
questions.hint: Use Karnaugh maps to optimize the decoding circuit

questions.question: A 3-to-1 multiplexer with select inputs S0, S1, and S2 is required to select one of three inputs (A, B, or C) to be connected to the output. What logic gates are needed to implement this multiplexer?
questions.hint: Use the logic functions derived from the truth table
